title: coryphopteris iwatsukii
intro: Coryphopteris iwatsukii, also known as Iwatsuki's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelychrietaceae. It is native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coryphopteris iwatsukii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
